module.name: no-literal-unions
module.description: Ban literal unions in favor of enums.

scenarios.name: should allow a type alias that references an enum
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should allow a union of non-literal types
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should allow property literal unions handled by the property-specific rule
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: no violation is reported by this rule

scenarios.name: should report a union of string literals
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should report a union of numeric literals
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should report a union of typeof references that resolve to string literal const values
scenarios.given: const Active = 'active'; const Inactive = 'inactive'; type Status = typeof Active | typeof Inactive
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should report an exported union of typeof references that resolve to string literal const values
scenarios.given: const Active = 'active'; const Inactive = 'inactive'; export type Status = typeof Active | typeof Inactive
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should report a union of typeof references that resolve through no-substitution template literal const values
scenarios.given: const Active = `active`; type Status = typeof Active | 'inactive'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should allow a non-exported union of typeof references that resolve to the full boolean domain
scenarios.given: const Enabled = true; const Disabled = false; type Toggle = typeof Enabled | typeof Disabled
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should allow an exported union of typeof references that resolve to the full boolean domain
scenarios.given: const Enabled = true; const Disabled = false; export type Toggle = typeof Enabled | typeof Disabled
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias
